//: Design-system gate (2026-07-13 audit, hardened 2026-07-14 2nd pass). The token ledger lives in src/styles/index.css — the ONE file allowed to hold raw values (it defines them). Everywhere else: colors must be tokens or color-mix of tokens (color-no-hex = error); spacing (margin/padding/gap), font-size, line-height, letter-spacing and border-radius must come from the --k-* / --c-* scales (error). Sanctioned exceptions carry an inline 'stylelint-disable-next-line … -- deliberate: <reason>' comment at the call site — every disable must state its reason.

declaration-property-value-disallowed-li.message: Use a design token (--k-* / --c-* in src/styles/index.css) instead of a raw value; truly deliberate values need a stylelint-disable comment with a reason
